instruction: Read the project purpose, scope, and current release status.
audience: Anyone arriving at the GitHub page

instruction: Use the normal commit-ready ZIP first. If extraction fails, use 7-Zip.

step_title: Open the workbook or CSV files
instruction: Start with the master field database and result interpretation rules.
audience: Users reviewing fields or test results

step_title: Run only tests you can actually perform
instruction: If using a symbol lookup app, enter symbols or symbol lists, not raw Yahoo endpoint URLs unless the app says it supports URLs.
Compare requested symbols with returned symbols before deciding whether Yahoo changed behavior.
Use the result interpretation rules to distinguish success, partial results, nulls, missing symbols, app compatibility limits, and schema drift.
Include date/time, symbol(s), endpoint or app feature, result state, raw output if available, and expected vs actual behavior.
